Entry.JapaneseText: Morning!
Hey ▲主人公＊▲, it's morning!
Morning! You up?
Hi, it's Manaka▼.
Hello?
How's it going? Just trying to be formal.
Aren't you hungry?
I felt like texting you.
Good evening?
Hey ▲主人公＊▲, it's night!
Wow, it's already this late.
...Did you fall asleep already?
Let's have a great day today!
Guess who's here with you today? It's me, Manaka!
Let's do our best today!
Talk to you later, kisses▼.
Let's keep our spirits up this afternoon!
I'll text you again!
Let's do our best again tomorrow?
Text me later, okay?
I'm gonna take a bath early today.
Heading to the bath now ▼
Good night!
Night! Love you ▼
Today’s [19], right?
It’s a day off, but waking up early can be nice too.
Morning text from [21]!
How’s your luck today, ▲主人公＊▲? I'm feeling good.
Are you actually awake?
How was your wake-up today?
Make sure to leave early so you won’t be late!
If you're sleepy, moving around a bit helps, you know?
It's so cozy, I might fall asleep again.
I opened the window and the flowers smell amazing.
Stay hydrated to enjoy sweating it out!
Last night was rough for sleeping. You okay, ▲主人公＊▲?
I'm getting sleepy again, might oversleep.
It's getting cold, so be careful with [22]!
So cold!
When it’s this cold… um, never mind!
I'm a bit sleepy today. I was thinking about you last night, ▲主人公＊▲.
Guess what the first thing I did when I woke up today was? I sent you this message!
It's such a nice morning, feels like something good's gonna happen, right?
Don't even think about going back to sleep, okay?
Have you eaten yet? It'll help you focus on studying. Concentrate, concentrate!
Do you like exercising? I enjoy being active outside of club activities too.
I have PE class today, so I’m getting pumped for it!
If I don't eat breakfast, I'll be nervous my stomach will growl in 4th period.
I checked out a fashion magazine with [23]. I really need to study, right?
I learned some skincare tips from [23]. Do you want me to share them with you, ▲主人公＊▲?
Today feels like a good day for studying. Maybe because I slept well last night?
How's it going?
Everyone seems a bit restless. It's [24], so I guess that's normal.
I'm feeling a bit fidgety. Is it because of [22]? Or are you talking about me, ▲主人公＊▲?
In class, [25] took off their shirt. So embarrassing!
When I get home today, I'm jumping in the shower right away. You shouldn't stay sweaty either, ▲主人公＊▲!
Since it's [24] for the arts, let's do our best in art class!
Since it's [24] for home economics, I want to make some sweets.
Looks like a lot of people aren't taking off their coats in class. It's cold!
Today in PE, we have a marathon. I need to warm up properly to avoid injuries.
Aww, I like you▼ I can't really say stuff like this at school, right?
My friends are all chatting about their boyfriends. Should I join in?
They're talking about their favorite idols. I wonder if you like that stuff too?
Looks like they're chatting about their ideal types. You into that kind of thing?
Hey, someone’s reading manga during class. Hope they don’t get caught by [26,2].
Texting during class is kinda thrilling, but I know I shouldn’t.
Morning classes are especially easy to focus in, but texting you might ruin that.
Hey! No daydreaming allowed! Surprised?
Writing in a new notebook feels so nice, doesn’t it?
I recommend at least reviewing a bit.
You’re the culprit! Surprised by that sudden twist?
If you study hard, your after-school time will be way more fun.
It’s so warm and nice today. I kinda wanna skip school and go have fun.
I was just zoning out. Gotta focus, right?
With this weather, sweating it out outside might feel great, huh?
Everyone looks so drained this morning. It’s rough, right?
I’m getting hungry already. But that’s just the hunger of [24], okay?
Don’t you think [24] is the best season for studying?
It’s [19] again today. Ugh, hope I can focus on studying.
[22] is trending. You should be careful about [22], okay?
If you were sitting next to me, I could casually lean over and say I forgot my textbook.
I just solved a problem and got praised by [26,2]. I want you to praise me too!
How's school today?
There are a lot of people dozing off in my class. I think [26,2] will wake them up soon.
Just taking it easy right now... I wonder if the afternoon will be like this too.
Next class is marathon. Do you think you can see me from the classroom?
Just taking a quick breather. What are you up to?
That formula from the last class was a bit tricky. Gonna review it when I get home.
There's a girl in class looking cozy with her boyfriend. Not jealous or anything!
Thinking about making some snacks when I get home. Not just because I'm hungry or anything!
We're passing letters around among the girls. Do you want one too?
I was watching you in the hallway earlier. Did you notice?
I saw some dandelions blooming on my way to school today. Made me want to cheer them on!
[24]... [24]... Wanna do something?
I really wish we had air conditioning in the classroom. Should I ask [26,2]?
The tap water's warm. The sun's amazing, huh?
The dried leaves are dancing outside the window. I wonder if they’d taste good roasted?
I bought a romance novel. I actually wanted a mystery novel, but this one’s nice too.
Having a heater in class is nice, but we need to ventilate during breaks. Is your class okay?
Looks cold today. Hope practice isn't too tough.
If I finish my homework now, I can hang out with ▲主人公＊▲ after school, right?
Is it weird if I keep texting during break? I wonder if ▲主人公＊▲ notices.
Boys get so lively during break, huh? Is that true for you too, ▲主人公＊▲?
I missed some notes in class. Can you show me next time?
There's a cute bunny on the show I'm watching! ▼
I got in trouble with Mom for playing the piano. I lost track of time, sorry for bothering the neighbors.
Since Dad's not home, Mom and I had dinner while watching TV. Not very polite, but it was exciting and fun♪
We're watching a quiz show with Dad and Mom, and I got the best score! Hehe, Dad's kinda jealous.
What dishes come to mind for 24]? I wanna try making seasonal food!
Did you see the tennis match on TV? It was amazing! I need to practice too!
Is it weird to study at home on my day off?
The other day, a patient’s grandkid came over, and we played doctor. Want to try it too, ▲主人公＊▲?
Just because it's 24], don't sleep in, okay?
It's getting chilly, so don’t sleep with the window open, alright?
Eating too many light foods isn’t good for you, so be careful.
Recently, there’s been an increase in patients at [22], so take care, ▲主人公＊▲.
It's getting colder, so watch out for colds!
It's the season of cravings! I need to be careful not to overeat. But sometimes, it’s okay, right?
It seems like there’s been an increase in patients at [22]. Make sure to wash your hands and gargle!
The city’s illuminations are beautiful in 24]. I wanna see them someday!
So, you know, they keep asking about you. It's kinda embarrassing, can't share everything.
I wanna see you! Hey, don't you wanna see me too?
So, yesterday while Dad was studying in his office, I secretly watched a variety show♪
Did you have homework today?
I’m making dinner tonight! Gonna put my heart into it.
Oh, laundry time♪ Doing the laundry♪
Today’s menu is... a secret♪
I baked some snacks, but I made too much. Will you eat some, please?
Mom can do everything, she's amazing. I gotta catch up!
Helping Mom in the garden. The flowers we watered every day are starting to bud. So happy!
I’m gonna clean the house now. Is your room nice and tidy?
On a sunny day, it feels great to hang out the laundry. But when it rains, the room gets all stuffy.
The violets are beautiful in [24]. The ones in our garden are starting to bloom too.
I messed up baking. Is it because of the weather in [24]? I gotta be careful.
The water lilies bloomed in the garden pond. They look so cute and plump!
Sunflowers bloomed in the garden. I wonder what they're staring at?
The cosmos in [24] are really pretty. I’m planning to fill the garden with them!
It’s the season for delicious food. What should I make today?
I tried making a cake. I put marshmallows on it to look like snow, but it might be hard to eat...
I wanna try a creative recipe. If you have any good ideas, let me know and let’s make it together!
Helping Mom again today. I wonder if Dad and Mom will praise me? But honestly, I'd be happier if ▲主人公＊▲ gave me some praise.
I made dinner tonight, and it turned out really tasty! ▲主人公＊▲ would like a girlfriend who's good at cooking, right?
I made dinner tonight, but... it didn't go well. Mom and Dad said it was good, but I think they were just being nice...
It's my turn to clean today. I have to help Mom who's always working hard.
Thanks to ▲主人公＊▲, I'm happy today too! ♪
I wish ▲主人公＊▲ could be here with me tonight.
Hey, the stars are really nice tonight. Just wanted to share that with ▲主人公＊▲.
I'm going to bed now.
Another day ends with a message from ▲主人公＊▲.
Make sure you don't stay up too late, okay? ▲主人公＊▲?
Homework's tough, and now it's this late. Are you doing okay, ▲主人公＊▲?
I feel like I'm already half asleep...
It's warm now, but don't sleep with the window open, okay?
The blankets feel so nice, don't they?
It's a tough season for sleeping, but make sure you keep warm, okay?
It's hot today; I might sweat while sleeping...
In this season, I can fall asleep right away listening to the bugs.
They say autumn nights are long, but I might not be able to enjoy them.
It's cold, so don't stay up too late or you'll catch a cold.
Stay warm and get to bed early, okay?
I wonder if I can sneak into your dreams tonight? Just a thought.
Goodnight kiss! I wish I could give you one in person. Muah▼
Practicing a lot makes food taste better, baths feel nice, and helps you sleep well, right?
It's already my bedtime.
Did you work hard today? I love that about you! Let’s tackle tomorrow together, okay?
I can’t seem to fall asleep tonight, which is kinda rare for me.
Homework's tough, and now it's this late. Are you doing okay, ▲主人公＊▲?
I’m not sleepy yet! I think I’ll stay up a bit longer, hehe♪
I miss you... you know?▼
Are you still awake? I don’t have anything special to say, just wanted to text you.
Did you have a fun day? Let’s keep it up tomorrow!
I stayed up late for once, and Mom told me to go to bed.
But don’t oversleep, okay? You’re my prince who wakes me up, after all.
Are you still awake? I’ll be waiting for you in my dreams▼
It’s hot every day, but since we’re a couple, I wanna snuggle up while we sleep. Is that too bold?
Don’t sleep too lightly just because it’s hot, or you might catch a cold! But if you do, I’ll take care of you.
I got caught up reading a romance novel and lost track of time. Maybe I’ll continue it in my dreams with you...?
Sometimes a late-night snack is okay, right? I know it’s not the best... but let’s keep it a secret▼
It’s so cold every day. I wish I could be warmed up by my boyfriend right now.
Hey, ▲主人公＊▲? I’m shivering from the cold over here! Hehe♪
I wish we could see each other at night soon, don’t you think?
Hey, I really like you▼
I wonder what you're thinking about right now... If I guess right, do I get a reward? Just kidding!
It can be tiring to work hard every day, but it’s fun too. Mostly 'cause you’re here with me.
I wanna play doubles with you. I’m ready whenever you are!
I’m so happy you’re practicing with me.
Today’s practice was tough, but I think I’ll sleep really well.
Hitting back the boys' balls is so hard. Should I practice my counters more?
What tension do you string your racket at? I think I like it a bit stiffer.
The shower after practice feels amazing, so I did some extra training♪
I should probably restring my racket soon. Is yours okay?
My dad and mom got me a new racket♪ I’ll work hard to help out, right?
There was a first-year who dozed off during practice. I mean, how can you sleep standing up?
I messed up my serve and hit a ball into the flowerbed... I hope the flowers are okay.
I hope the kid who fell during practice is alright. We need to take care of ourselves too, okay?
It was hot today, but I felt great sweating it out with my sports drink. Want some?
After practice in this season, I get super hungry. I might eat too much today♪
This might be the best season for practice.
My hands are freezing holding the racket. Hah, hah.
After practice, I have to wipe off my sweat with a towel, okay? Want me to wipe you down? Just kidding!
I’d love a massage after practice, just saying.
Everyone's been asking about you, ▲主人公＊▲. They love that kind of gossip!
Practice is tough, and everyone seems to be struggling.
Everyone's talking about their boyfriends. I feel a bit shy about joining in.
Morning!
Hey, good morning!
Good morning! It's such a lovely morning.
Mornin'!
It's Naka!
Make sure to take care of yourself, okay?
Just sending you a morning message♪
It's definitely a morning vibe♪
I'm about to enjoy my morning tea♪
You texted me, so I think today will be great!
Just because it's a day off doesn't mean you should nap all day, okay?
Have you decided what to do?
I think I'll have toast for breakfast.
I can hear the little birds singing.
Waking up in this season feels really nice.
Even if it's chilly, ▲主人公＊▲ is full of energy♪
I'm gonna hop in the shower♪
Woke up feeling great♪
Getting up's getting a bit tough, huh?
I turned on the heater as soon as you got here.
But it's still cold! Ugh.
Right?
Let's do our best!
You ready to tackle the day?
Yeah!
For sure!
Come on, you're late with your texts!
I’m gonna sleep too.
Thanks for today, you worked hard.
I wonder if I can dream tonight.
I'm done, I'm so sleepy...
Did you have fun today?
See you tomorrow!
Don't stay up too late, okay?
I really need to sleep.
Ah, my blanket's so warm.
I think I'm gonna snuggle in more.
Don't sleep with your belly out, okay?
I can hear the cicadas chirping, though...
I got so caught up in writing, and now it's this late.
The sound of the bugs is nice...
The futon feels cold when I get in. But...
Ah, the futon's so warm!
Good night!
Nyaam nyaam, good night♪
Nighty night!
Sleep tight!
Huh?
What?
I'm in class right now.
Can't help it during class, huh?
I'm not doing anything...
まには、息抜き息抜き♪
単語を覚えないと。
っそり腕のストレッチしちゃお。
んなときにメールする悪い子はおしおきだよ？
主人公＊▲と、メール中。なんて
Are you studying properly?
I'm super motivated!
Don't let the weather get you down.
I might've been slacking off...
Just a little? I'm still doing fine.
Don't let the heat get to you.
Studying's going great!
You're not thinking about sweet potatoes, right?
It's so cold, I can't even hold my pen.
You can't let the cold beat you.
I should be focused on studying, but I'm thinking about you.
Maybe it's a little bad that Manaka wants to text you?
Sneaking in a text is kinda fun.
Just don't let anyone find out!
I just got out of the bath.
I'm all fresh from the bath... um...
Just got out of the bath, you know?
I'm kinda embarrassed.
I need to dry off.
Have you taken a bath yet?
You getting in the bath soon?
A shower will totally refresh you after that!
After club activities, a shower's a must, right?
Hope you feel fresh after your bath too!
Did you feel refreshed after your bath?
The scent of that bath bomb was so soothing!
I can't decide which bath bomb to use.
It's my second bath of the day!
Just cooling off a bit now.
Is it weird to read a book in the bath?
I ended up reading the whole book.
Make sure it doesn't cool down! Just splash a little water on your legs.
I took my bath. Gonna hit the hay early tonight.
For now, I'm putting on my pajamas. Talk later!
If you want, I can wash your back? Just saying!
I'll text you later, okay?
I'm in the middle of dinner right now.
I was just eating.
I'm having my meal right now.
、お食事中なの[32]
It's lunchtime! 😊
Sneaking in a text while hiding from my dad.
Hope he doesn't find out I'm texting...
I wonder if ▲主人公＊▲ has eaten yet.
Sorry for texting while you're eating.
I made today's lunch! 😊
Today's lunch is my special dish! 😊
Do you want to eat together, ▲主人公＊▲?
Today's main dish is... 🎶
The veggies are sweet and delicious! 🎶
The strawberries are so good! 😊
I wanna eat watermelon while watching fireworks.
I'm having ice cream later, yum! 🍦
Is it gonna be... 🎶?
Gotta be careful not to overdo it.
It has to be... 🎶 right?
Ice cream is a must during the hot season! 🎶
I'm at the cafeteria, invited by a friend.
I was nervous, but I tried the shop. Got some yakisoba bread! 🎶
What are you eating, ▲主人公＊▲?
I tried baking some bread. Had it with tea! [32]
I’ll get in trouble if my parents find out, so talk later.
Let’s keep it up, okay?
Thanks for the meal! ♪
Anyway, I should say thanks. Talk soon.
I’m studying right now! [32]
I’m studying...
Your tutor Manaka here! [32] Just kidding.
Time for a little break.
Did you finish your homework?
Reviewing is good, but don’t forget to email me too.
Studying is important too, you know.
Are you studying too, ▲主人公＊▲?
Even on break, keep it up.
This time, there’s a lot of homework. It’s tough.
Cooking counts as studying, right?
What are you studying, ▲主人公＊▲?
I’m getting sleepy, but I need to focus, focus! ♪
You can relax after you finish your homework, okay?
If I solve this next problem, I’m treating myself to ice cream! ♪
I got so focused, I almost forgot everything.
Don’t overdo it with the late-night snacks, okay?
Fall really makes studying so much easier.
Sitting here all cozy makes me sleepy.
Is the 'chan-chan' thing too old-fashioned? I can't show it to you, ▲主人公＊▲, but I kinda like it.
Wanna try figuring me out?
I really wanna study together with you, ▲主人公＊▲.
Thanks for messaging me!
If you have any questions, just ask me, okay?
Ahhhh... I'm yawning.
That feels nice.
Maybe I should.
You’re unusually sleeping in today.
Wow, it's already noon.
I’m not slacking off, okay?
Just taking a nap.
I’m so happy to hear from you!
It's already evening, time flies.
Before I know it, it’s this late.
I’m really glad to hear from you!
The day's almost over, huh?
It turned out like this.
Looks like today’s coming to an end.
Good night.
The end of the day feels lonelier on days off.
...That bunny is so cute.
Studying's fun, right?
Ever get so into tennis that it takes over your mind?
This might be random, but wanna try my cooking?
I woke up early, so I’m going for a morning walk. It feels nice.
I’m in the middle of something.
What? I’m in club activities right now.
I’m in practice.
I’m changing right now.
Come to practice, okay?
Are you off today?
Today’s practice seems to focus on the basics.
Today’s practice might be a bit lacking.
Well, it can’t be helped.
I wonder if I should’ve gone somewhere with ▲主人公＊▲.
I feel super light today.
If I mess up during practice, let me know, okay?
I might just practice a lot.
With swings, it's all about building up, right?
Do you get disappointed with strength training?
But first, I need to take care of my racket.
Everyone's so laid-back.
It's definitely sports time!
So sweaty...
Make sure to drink water, okay?
The sunset is so pretty.
When I move a lot, it makes me super hungry.
Let's stretch a bit longer than usual.
With this cold, I might not move much...?
Even during practice, I’ll reply to your messages.
During practice, keep an eye on me more!
Practice is fun, right? ♪
Yay! Let's go!
Uh... I might not be feeling great...
I’m not feeling too good... maybe?
Not too bad, I guess? Just saying.
Yeah, I'm feeling good! ♪
I'm doing great! [32]
When that happens, maybe I should do something different to change my mood?
I can't just keep feeling down.
If I keep worrying... that's no good.
Sorry for the short reply.
Maybe I should email to clear my head?
Want to change things up?
I need to do something fun, right?
If I could see you, ▲主人公＊▲, I think I'd feel better.
Sometimes, you just need a break.
I kinda want to relax, you know?
How's ▲主人公＊▲ doing?
Talking to you makes me feel even better, you know?
I think my good mood is thanks to ▲主人公＊▲.
You're my source of happiness, ▲主人公＊▲... for sure.
Thanks for the message! It's made me even happier.
I really want you to cheer me up.
I even got an email from you... [32]
Want some of my energy? Just asking!
Then I might be able to do anything!
Thanks to you, I'm feeling super energetic today! Hehe♪
...Really?
Thanks! That makes me so happy.
Me too...
I love you too!
I love you a lot!
It really makes me feel secure when you say you love me.
What’s up? But I’m really happy.
Say it again?
I feel the same.
I love you, ▲主人公＊▲.
But it’s still not enough. Say it more, please.
I want to be even happier.
If you say stuff like that, I can't help but think about you.
What will you do if I say 'K'? Just curious.
Of course not.
Because I do.
Is that all? Hehe♪
Ugh, I'm so embarrassed. But it makes me really happy.
It's kinda embarrassing, right? But it's not weird, is it?
It's nice to hear you say that... no, wait, it's still embarrassing.
I'm so happy being with ▲主人公＊▲[32]
Say "kiss" ten times? ...Okay, ...muah[32]
I love you so much[32]
▼▼▼▼▼▼▼▼▼...I can't put this feeling into words[32]
Mhm.
I want to see you too...
I want to see you[32]
Naka wants to see you too[32]
Because?
Right away?
I'm just not in the mood.
Sorry. I'm not feeling well right now.
Maybe it's not so bad?
Will it help clear my head?
Will you take me somewhere?
I hope we can find a time that works.
I miss you...
I don't wanna say I don't miss you. Just kidding. I really do.
Ugh, it can't be helped.
Being able to meet up when you want is one of the best things about being in love.
Hurry up? If you don't, I won't wait for you, you know? Just saying.
Like, right away.
Even if it's just for a bit.
I've been thinking about you, ▲主人公＊▲...
You’re thinking about me too, huh? We're so in sync.
We can meet up soon, right?
I really wanna see you.
I can't hold back any longer.
Is that so?
Even in times like this.
Right?
Yeah...
...I feel lonely.
Don't get mad at me.
Don't tease me.
Take care of yourself, okay?
I might do something too.
Just stay calm, alright?
Let’s take it slow, okay?
You can’t push yourself too hard, okay?
Just pay attention to what you’re doing, alright?
I’ll do my best too.
I’ll give it my all too♪
I’m gonna do my best♪
You’re really working hard, huh? That’s amazing.
I wanna see you trying your best, ▲主人公＊▲.
Just don’t overdo it, I’m cheering for you.
Don’t do anything reckless, it worries me.
I’m really happy you text me even when you’re busy.
If you’re busy, it means less time to see me.
But we’ll see each other again soon, I’m waiting for you[32].
Thanks for texting me, I appreciate it[32].
I’m just chilling here, you know? Just saying[32].
What’s going on?
Is it tough?
What’s up?
It’s nice to see you♪
Me too...
Hmm, I can’t think of anything right now.
Did you finish your homework, ▲主人公＊▲?
Ugh, I gotta study.
Maybe try moving around a bit?
I’m reading a book right now. Want to read it too, ▲主人公＊▲?
How about going for a walk?
Doing some moves might help you feel better?
How about memorizing some history?
I have a book I recommend. Want to read it together?
We might be in different subjects, but wanna do homework together?
You can always email me, you know?
Shall we practice together?
Maybe it’s because I can’t see you, ▲主人公＊▲?
Thanks for the email! I’ll keep you company.
Since I got an email from you, I might not be so bored anymore.
So, let’s keep texting, okay?
I was waiting for your email, ▲主人公＊▲[32]
Hehe, this is a bit embarrassing, huh?[32]
There's a spot next to Naka, just saying!
Let's text more!
Aww...
Not really...
What's up?
Heh.
Hehe♪
I've been having a rough time, it's frustrating.
I'm kinda jealous.
Feeling good?
Can you share some with me?
Maybe that’ll lift my mood?
I'm in a bit of a slump.
I lost to the club president earlier.
I'm a bit sleepy today. Gotta wake up!
Did something cute happen?
Did you find a cute bunny or something?
Did you win a practice match?
Did you eat at the cafe?
I actually beat the boys' club president the other day!
I'm starting to feel happy too.
I scored a bunch of service aces! I think I'm on a roll.
I've been feeling pretty good lately too♪
Me too!
Ever since I met ▲主人公＊▲, I've felt this way.
It's just how I am.
I can't believe I'm emailing about this.
I might be feeling the same way...
Did you mess up?
Sometimes I get down too...
Is there something I can do for you?
Are you okay? I'm worried.
I can't just stay like this.
I'd feel better if ▲主人公＊▲ was here with me.
Let's change our mood so we don't feel down.
Should I try to cheer up?
Think positively, okay?
Don't just focus on the negative!
Let's stay positive!
Let's do our best together!
Can I really help you?
Being happy is the most important, right?
Let's think of something fun, okay?
I know so many great things about you, ▲主人公＊▲!
If you need anything, just tell me.
I wish I could be right by your side.
I hope you stay happy...
You always give me courage...
Stay positive, okay? Can't move forward if you're negative.
Naka will comfort you, saying you're a good kid.
What you see isn’t everything, you know? I'm here for you.
Look, can you see me? Just saying...
Are you okay?
Feeling okay?
Cheer up, okay?
You sound tired♪
Thanks for your hard work!
Did you overdo it today?
Just take it easy.
It's not me, right?
Cheer up, okay?
You not feeling well?
You can't push yourself too hard, alright?
Take a break and rest up, okay?
Make sure to eat something nutritious.
Get some good rest, okay?
If you need to, it’s totally fine to rest.
Pushing yourself isn’t good for you, you know?
Thanks for your hard work today.
Did you do your best today?
You really gave it your all, huh?
Just know I'm cheering for you.
If there's anything I can do to help, just let me know.
Thanks for the message even though you're busy. I really like that about you, Manaka.
Even when things are tough, ▲主人公＊▲ is so kind. Take it easy, okay?
I'll be here to heal you.
Want me to give you a massage? Just kidding!
